message: The camp foundry sits close to the commissary. It is yet early in the day and most of the forges here sit cool, with only a couple of smiths working weapons for the company.
gets back to their tent after the physicks release them and picks up the blackened bow They head over to the blacksmiths' tent with determination.
The smell of smouldering iron and coals still makes you choke a little as your enter the smoky tent.
approaches the friendliest looking smith and shows them the pair of bows.
Can you help me do this...
indicates the string of the strange one.
... for this bow?
indicates their own bow.
This short, stocky man, his bald pate covered in sweat, eyes the bow suspiciously, then eyes Orin with equal suspicion.
Ey, aren't you friends with that scarred fellow? What's-'is... Nal?
Ba.
Aye, he promised to run... an errand for me but I ain't never got what was promised.
I'm sorry. He's been taken with some other work. Is it something I can help with?
Might be you could. What you be wanting?
Your know-how with metal, combined with my know-how of bows... and we sus this metal string out to make one like it for my own bow.
rubs his chin.
Don't say "gentleman's malady"!
LOL 😛
Hahahaha.
Sounds like hes got an itch needs scratching.
Oh god.
Ba still has no clue what a gentlemen’s malady is and why Orin found it so funny.. he’s gonna find out at some point xD.
LIAM!!!!
Hey guys just a quick drop in cos I was reading xD.
Lol hey Liam! So excited to get that quest passed on to me.
Hi Liam.
Ha ha how are you?
Where are you?
Hahahaha if only.. haven’t actually left yet but they wanted me to leave tomorrow so I was getting ready then they put it off another week so next Friday!
Also I can update some peeps I got my assignment I’ll be going to Scandinavia and russia for the first 4/5 months and then last 1/2 in the Caribbean I can’t wait!
Niiiice!!!
Now you're just showing off 😛
Oh amazing!
Aye, but first I'll need you to get something for me. I'm suffering from...
looks around the tent.
leans in, curious.
... a er painful malady of a.... personal nature. I need a cure. Something from the apothecaries of Dismas.
coughs... to hide a laugh.
Right. That must be difficult. And you've tried the camp Physicks? They're an able bunch, if not a little greedy?
If I was asking for this, would I want word of it spreading around camp? Do we have a deal or not?
Fetch.
looks around at the other smiths...
I could go to someone else.
laughs.
We're smiths, not fools. None of the others will touch that cursed swine steel!
Well, in that case, it was a pleasure to hear your secret.
stalks back off to their tent.
